title: Device Home Screen - Internet is off - User Guide
scenario: User Guide shows "Something went wrong" instead of "Feature unavailable" dialog when offline and accessed from Device Settings 3-dot menu on newly connected device
steps: 1. Ensure the device has no internet connection (e.g., Airplane Mode or Wi-Fi/cellular data off).
2. Pair and connect a new Poly Bluetooth audio device to the Android device via system Bluetooth settings.
3. Open the Poly Studio Mobile app.
4. Navigate to the Home screen and tap on the connected [Device Name] to enter Device Settings.
5. Tap the 3-dot menu (overflow menu) in the top-right corner of the Device Settings page.
8. Tap the "X" button to close the error screen.
expected: The User Guide should load and display correctly, or if offline, a "Feature unavailable" dialog should appear informing the user that the feature requires an internet connection.
